x-enumeration-literals.name: Specific Collateral
x-enumeration-literals.description: Repurchase agreement where a single, pre-defined, financial instrument is sold and repurchased. (IS020022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: General Collateral
x-enumeration-literals.description: Repurchase agreement where the agreement allows for the sale and repurchase of any of a selection of assets from a pool of eligible assets. (ISO20022)
